---
id: set-vrma-speed
title: "Set VRMA playback speed"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Set VRMA playback speed"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/vrma/speed"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Set the playback speed multiplier for a VRMA animation on the specified VRM entity.
